title: Delicate Vegan Canadian Baby New Potato Hash
description: A rich and light Canadian dish featuring baby new potatoes, this vegan-friendly hash is perfect for a snack or side dish. It is cooked in a kadhai with score-fat for added flavor.
instructions: Heat the melted score-fat in a large kadhai over medium heat.
Add the diced onion to the kadhai and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the kadhai and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced bell pepper to the kadhai and cook until it is tender.
Add the diced baby new potatoes to the kadhai and cook until they are golden brown.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the kadhai and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and cook the hash for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and serve the hash hot.
